ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gene_enrichments" (
  "enrichment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrichment analysis */,
  "term" TEXT /* Gene ontology term associated with the enrichment */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the term (e.g., GOTERM_CC_DIRECT) */,
  "gene_count" INTEGER /* Number of genes associated with this term */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total genes represented by this term */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value indicating statistical significance of the enrichment */,
  "genes" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of gene IDs associated with this term */,
  "source_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for the enrichment analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the enrichment analysis was performed */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the enrichment analysis (e.g., hypergeometric test, Fisher's exact test) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrichment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_enrichments_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_enrichments_source_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_annotations" (
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Common name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gene's function */,
  "ontology_terms" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of ontology terms associated with this gene */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species to which the gene belongs */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the gene */,
  "gene_type" TEXT /* Type of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., GOTERM_CC_DIRECT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category for hierarchical categorization */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical metric entry */,
  "enrichment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the enrichment analysis this metric is related to */,
  "fold_enrichment" REAL /* Fold enrichment value for the analysis */,
  "bonferroni" REAL /* Bonferroni correction value */,
  "benjamini" REAL /* Benjamini-Hochberg correction value */,
  "fdr" REAL /* False discovery rate (FDR) associated with the analysis */,
  "q_value" REAL /* Q-value for multiple testing correction */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the fold enrichment */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Name of the tool used for the statistical analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_metrics_enrichment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrichment_id") REFERENCES gene_enrichments ("enrichment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the enrichment analysis */,
  "enrichment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrichment analysis accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_enrichment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrichment_id") REFERENCES gene_enrichments ("enrichment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_lists" (
  "list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the gene list */,
  "list_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene list */,
  "genes" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of gene IDs in this list */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene list */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene list was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene list was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the gene list */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_lists_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the dataset file */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the dataset is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
